title: Present perfect for life experience
subtitle: Talk about what you have done in life.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I have never tried that food.
I have traveled alone several times.

items.es: He visitado varios países, pero nunca he ido a España.
items.en: I have visited several countries, but I have never gone to Spain.
Have you ever tried Peruvian food?

items.es: Nunca he vivido en una ciudad muy grande.
items.en: I have never lived in a very big city.

items.es: He hablado con nativos algunas veces.
items.en: I have spoken with native speakers a few times.

items.es: Todavía no he hecho un viaje largo en español.
items.en: I still have not taken a long trip in Spanish.
